description: Top 10 AI/startup accelerators relevant to InBharat AI

leads.name: Y Combinator
leads.focus: All sectors, strong AI cohorts, global startups
leads.deadline_info: Applications typically close 2-3 months before batch starts
leads.notes: Best accelerator globally; strong India founder representation

leads.name: Techstars
leads.deadline_info: Varies by program; check individual accelerator pages
leads.notes: Multiple AI-specific programs; Techstars AI program

leads.name: 500 Global
leads.deadline_info: Rolling applications; regional programs in SE Asia and India
leads.notes: Strong emerging market focus; India and SE Asia programs

leads.name: Microsoft for Startups (Founders Hub)
leads.focus: AI, cloud, enterprise SaaS, developer tools
leads.deal: Up to $150K Azure credits, no equity
leads.notes: Azure credits, OpenAI API credits, GitHub Copilot, mentorship

leads.name: Google for Startups Accelerator
leads.deal: Google Cloud credits, mentorship, no equity
leads.deadline_info: India AI accelerator typically opens H1 each year
leads.notes: Google for Startups Accelerator: India specific AI/ML program

leads.name: NASSCOM DeepTech Club
leads.focus: DeepTech, AI/ML, IoT, Blockchain, India startups
leads.deadline_info: Check NASSCOM website for current cohort applications
leads.notes: India's largest tech body; strong government and enterprise connections

leads.name: T-Hub
leads.focus: AI, IoT, Enterprise Tech, Social Impact
leads.deal: Lab access, mentorship, corporate connects, no equity
leads.deadline_info: Various programs; check T-Hub programs page
leads.notes: India's largest incubator; Telangana government backed

leads.name: IIM Bangalore NSRCEL
leads.focus: Social enterprise, AI for impact, EdTech, HealthTech
leads.deal: Mentorship, grants up to INR 30L, workspace, no equity
leads.deadline_info: Check NSRCEL programs page for current openings
leads.notes: Strong social impact focus; good for India-first AI products

leads.name: Antler India
leads.notes: Global VC + accelerator; strong in India; also invests at Day 0

leads.name: Plug and Play Tech Center
leads.focus: AI, Enterprise, FinTech, HealthTech, Supply Chain
leads.deal: Corporate partnership access, mentorship, optional investment
leads.notes: Strong corporate innovation connections; 500+ corporate partners
